user_story: Como administrador, eu quero que os pills não exibam zeros enquanto as contagens estão carregando para que eu não confunda um estado transitório com dados reais.
existing_test_name: não deve exibir badges quando stats são undefined (loading)
test_output_summary: 6/6 tests passed in user-filter-bar.test.tsx. Target test 'não deve exibir badges quando stats são undefined (loading)' PASSED. All assertions verified: no '0' placeholder rendered when stats=undefined.

rf_007_coverage.evidence: Existing test 'não deve exibir badges quando stats são undefined (loading)' — stats=undefined passed to UserFilterBar, asserts queryByText('0') not in document.

rf_008_coverage.evidence: useUserStats() has no initialData/placeholderData. TanStack Query sets data=undefined when queryFn throws. page.tsx line 245 destructures { data: stats } — stats=undefined on error. Line 316 passes stats={stats} to UserFilterBar. Same code path as RF-007.

screenshot_note: Dev server not running — screenshot skipped.
notes: RF-007 and RF-008 share identical runtime behavior: both produce stats=undefined → UserFilterBar renders pills without badge. Chain verified: useUserStats (use-user-stats.ts:22-32) → no initialData → TanStack Query data=undefined on error/loading → page.tsx passes undefined to UserFilterBar → component conditionally renders badge only when stats prop is defined.
